title: fisk-ai session store v1 common definitions

protocol.description: Record schema id, e.g. io.choria.fisk-ai.v1.session.meta. Self-describes the record independent of where it is stored.

seq.description: Monotonic record id within a run, the ordering authority. Starts at 1 on the meta record.

fingerprint.description: Configuration the run was started with; validated on resume. The system prompt is stored as a hash, never verbatim.

provider.description: Neutral provider id the run was started with. A resume against a different provider is refused unconditionally (--force does not apply).
